title: Remove date from Vastu Advance Course section

requirements.summary: Remove date or date-related text from the Vastu Advance Course entry in the Services page
acceptanceCriteria: No date text is visible in the Vastu Advance Course section.
All other content in the Vastu Advance Course section remains unchanged.
No date is shown in any card, detail panel, or modal related to the Vastu Advance Course.

file_operations.description: Locate the Vastu Advance Course service definition in the services array and remove any date-related fields (such as 'date', 'startDate', 'batchDate', 'upcomingDate', or similar properties) from its data object. Ensure all other fields (description, includes, modes, duration, price, etc.) remain intact. If the date appears in the service card rendering logic, remove that display element as well while preserving the card's layout and other content.
